content.problemStatement:
Chef is the leader of Chef's Earth Defense Organization, and his mission is to counter aliens which are threatening the earth. According to information gathered by the organization, there are NNN alien spaceships (numbered 111 through NNN) planning to invade the earth. The iii-th spaceship will appear on the radar at time CiC_iCi​. Each spaceship needs DDD time to reach earth once it appears on the radar.

Chef's organization owns a huge laser cannon which can destroy one spaceship in one shot. However, once the cannon is used once it needs some amount of cool-down time in order to be used again (first shot doesn't require cool-down time before it is used). This cool-down time, however, is configurable. It has to be set before the first shot, and cannot be changed after that. If Chef sets a lower cool-down time, that would increase the energy consumed by the cannon, and vice-versa - the higher the cool-down time, the lower the energy consumed.

This might be a long battle, and Chef wants to use as little energy as possible. So Chef wants to maximize the cool-down time while still being able to destroy all spaceships before any of them arrive on earth. In particular, the iii-th spaceship should be shot between the times CiC_iCi​ and Ci+DC_i + DCi​+D (both end points inclusive).

###Input:


The first line of input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two integers NNN and DDD.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers C1,C2,…,CNC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_NC1​,C2​,…,CN​.
###Output:
For each test case, print a single line containing one real number― the maximum cool-down time possible. Your answer will be considered correct if the absolute or relative error of the answer does not exceed 10−610^{-6}10−6.

###Constraints


1≤T≤10001 \leq T \leq 10001≤T≤1000
2≤N≤1052 \leq N \leq 10^52≤N≤105
1≤Ci≤1091 \leq C_i \leq 10^91≤Ci​≤109 for each valid iii
1≤D≤1091 \leq D \leq 10^91≤D≤109
The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
###Subtasks
**Subtask #1 (50 points):**


N≤1,000N \le 1,000N≤1,000
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10,00010,00010,000
